content: I am an economist based at the London School of Economics and Political Science, studying environmental issues primarily in low and middle income countries. I am currently finishing up a PhD at the LSE, where I am affiliated with the STICERD EEE program and the Grantham Research Institute. Thank you for visiting my website!
summary: I am an economist based at the London School of Economics and Political Science, studying environmental issues primarily in low and middle income countries. I am currently finishing up a PhD at the LSE, where I am affiliated with the STICERD EEE program and the Grantham Research Institute.
title: Anshuman Tiwari

content:
吳恩達 is a professor of artificial intelligence at the Stanford AI Lab. His research interests include distributed robotics, mobile computing and programmable matter. He leads the Robotic Neurobiology group, which develops self-reconfiguring robots, systems of self-organizing robots, and mobile sensor networks.

summary: 吳恩達 is a professor of artificial intelligence at the Stanford AI Lab. His research interests include distributed robotics, mobile computing and programmable matter. He leads the Robotic Neurobiology group, which develops self-reconfiguring robots, systems of self-organizing robots, and mobile sensor networks.
title: 吳恩達

content:
Flexibility This feature can be used for publishing content such as:
 Online courses Project or software documentation Tutorials  The courses folder may be renamed. For example, we can rename it to docs for software/project documentation or tutorials for creating an online course.
Delete tutorials To remove these pages, delete the courses folder and see below to delete the associated menu link.
Update site menu After renaming or deleting the courses folder, you may wish to update any [[main]] menu links to it by editing your menu configuration at config/_default/menus.toml.
For example, if you delete this folder, you can remove the following from your menu configuration:
[[main]]name = "Courses"url = "courses/"weight = 50 Or, if you are creating a software documentation site, you can rename the courses folder to docs and update the associated Courses menu configuration to:
[[main]]name = "Docs"url = "docs/"weight = 50 Update the docs menu If you use the docs layout, note that the name of the menu in the front matter should be in the form [menu.X] where X is the folder name. Hence, if you rename the courses/example/ folder, you should also rename the menu definitions in the front matter of files within courses/example/ from [menu.example] to [menu.<NewFolderName>].
summary: Learn how to use Academic's docs layout for publishing online courses, software documentation, and tutorials.

title: Example Page 2

summary: How do consistently high levels of air pollution in some Indian cities affect aggregate output and spatial inequality? I investigate this question in the context of India through a quantitative spatial equilibrium model that features endogenous air pollution generation from both agriculture and non-agriculture, with pollution transport across locations. Using exogenous variation in yearly wind and cropping patterns, I first provide evidence that up to 23% of particulate matter concentrations (pm2.5) in Indian cities can be explained by agricultural fires. Pollution causes both amenity and productivity shocks to workers who can engage in costly migration in response. I estimate the pollution elasticity of migration that governs the disutility from air pollution using exogenous variation in daily wind patterns and fire counts, the income elasticity that governs migration response to relative income differences using instruments from trade theory, and the labor elasticity of agricultural fires using panel data. Model counterfactuals that reduce prevalence of agricultural fires in north-western India to levels in the rest of the country raise national GDP by 1.16%, with the Gini coefficient of spatial welfare reducing by 1.2%. Sorting toward downwind cities from distant cities further increases GDP in downwind cities but at minor cost to welfare gains.
title: The Impact of Reducing Agricultural Fires on Aggregate Productivity and Spatial Inequality in India
